name: Legendary Six Samurai - Mizuho
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>真</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>六</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ろく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>武</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぶ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>衆</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－ミズホ
desc: If you control "Legendary Six Samurai - Shinai", you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). Once per turn: You can Tribute another face-up "Six Samurai" monster, then target 1 card on the field; destroy that target.
mnst_eff: If you control "Legendary Six Samurai - Shinai", you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). Once per turn: You can Tribute another face-up "Six Samurai" monster, then target 1 card on the field; destroy that target.
eff: If you control "Legendary Six Samurai - Shinai", you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). Once per turn: You can Tribute another face-up "Six Samurai" monster, then target 1 card on the field; destroy that target.

summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
